results.title: Dexie.js
results.description: Dexie.js is a wrapper library for IndexedDB, making it easier and more enjoyable to work with the browser's standard database, offering enhanced stability and performance.

results.title: Dexie.js
results.description: Dexie.js is a popular open-source wrapper for IndexedDB, simplifying database interactions for offline-first web applications with features like sync and cloud integration.

results.title: TanStack Dexie DB Collection
results.description: A library that provides seamless integration between TanStack DB and Dexie.js, enabling local-first persistence with IndexedDB storage, reactive updates, and optimistic mutations for offline-capable applications.

results.title: Dexter
results.description: Dexter is an automatic indexer for PostgreSQL that analyzes slow queries and recommends or creates indexes to improve database performance.

results.title: DevDb
results.description: DevDb is a lightweight VS Code extension that automatically loads your database and provides powerful affordances, such as one-click table open, data manipulation, and schema insights, to aid development and debugging.

results.title: Duckdbex
results.description: An Elixir library that embeds the C++ DuckDB in-process analytical SQL database into Elixir applications, supporting CSV and Parquet data formats.

results.title: Yjs IndexedDB
results.description: IndexedDB database provider for Yjs that enables persistent storage of shared data in the browser, facilitating offline editing and minimizing data exchange.

results.title: Debian Trixie
results.description: Debian "trixie" is the codename for the upcoming stable release of the Debian operating system, detailing its release information, supported architectures, and known issues.

results.title: dbx
results.description: dbx is a CLI tool for development and advanced Databricks workflows management, simplifying deployment and packaging for Databricks environments.

results.title: Decaide
results.description: DecA(I)de is an AI-powered educational platform that helps high school students prepare for DECA business competitions with AI-generated content, interactive practice, and performance tracking.

results.title: Deneb
results.description: Deneb enables declarative visualization in Power BI using the Vega language.

results.title: Dex
results.description: Dex is an identity service that uses OpenID Connect to drive authentication for other apps, acting as a federated provider that defers authentication to other identity providers through connectors.

results.title: DiceDB
results.description: DiceDB is an open-source, fast, reactive, in-memory database optimized for modern hardware, commonly used as a cache for real-time data updates.

results.title: IddCx (Indirect Display Driver Class Extension)
results.description: IddCx provides programming interfaces for Windows indirect display drivers (IDDs) to manage virtual displays, handle display configuration, and interact with the OS for display-related operations.

results.title: DCEvo
results.description: DCEvo implements Discriminative Cross-Dimensional Evolutionary Learning for infrared and visible image fusion, offering both pure fusion and task-guided fusion methods.

results.title: Dexter
results.description: Dexter is a customizable TypeScript SDK designed for interacting with various decentralized exchanges (DEXs) on the Cardano blockchain, enabling features like fetching liquidity pools, submitting swap orders, and integrating custom data or wallet providers.

results.title: Debux
results.description: Debux is a debugging utility or library, inferred from its project name, designed to assist developers in identifying and resolving issues in their code.

results.title: Codex
results.description: Codex is the fastest, most reliable enhanced data API for DeFi data across 100+ networks, offering queries, subscriptions, and webhooks.

results.title: edgeX
results.description: edgeX is an Ethereum Layer-2 blockchain providing a high-performance on-chain trading infrastructure and a unified interface for DeFi. It offers advanced trading features, cross-chain liquidity, and a CEX-like user experience for various financial products.

results.title: Degenbot
results.description: Degenbot provides Python classes to abstract Uniswap liquidity pools and ERC-20 tokens, utilizing web3.py for EVM blockchain interaction.

results.title: DEX Screener Docs
results.description: DEX Screener provides real-time data and analytics for decentralized exchanges, offering tools like charts, screeners, and API access for blockchain data.

results.title: Dendrix
results.description: Community driven Dendritic Nix configurations.

results.title: DSiem
results.description: Dsiem is a security event correlation engine for the ELK stack, enabling it to function as a full-featured SIEM with OSSIM-style correlation, threat intelligence enrichment, and risk-adjusted alarms.

results.title: Debezium
results.description: Debezium is an open-source platform for capturing and streaming database change events in low latency, enabling applications to react to data modifications in real-time.

results.title: dYdX (llmstxt)
results.description: dYdX is a decentralized exchange protocol for perpetual contracts, offering high throughput and low fees through its Layer 2 scaling solution.

results.title: H3 DuckDB
results.description: H3 DuckDB is a DuckDB extension that adds support for the H3 discrete global grid system, allowing users to index points and geometries to hexagons in SQL.

results.title: DiscoverX
results.description: DiscoverX is a Lakehouse administration tool that automates multi-table operations through SQL templates and Python functions, enabling concurrent execution across multiple Delta tables for maintenance, governance, and semantic classification tasks.

results.title: DeepXDE
results.description: DeepXDE is a library for scientific machine learning and physics-informed learning, supporting various neural network architectures for solving differential equations and learning operators.

results.title: Demex (llmstxt)
results.description: Demex is a decentralized exchange offering features like one-click trading, rewards programs, and various trading competitions.

results.title: decoupler
results.description: A Python package providing an ensemble of enrichment statistical methods to infer biologically driven scores from omics data within a unified framework, designed for interoperability with scverse tools.
